title: Dispose resources a State object owns
description: Controllers, stream subscriptions, animations, and timers created by a State must be released in dispose().
body: Use when a StatefulWidget's State creates a TextEditingController, AnimationController, StreamSubscription, FocusNode, or Timer. Do not create these without a matching teardown. Actions: instantiate them in initState, store them on the State, and cancel/dispose each in the dispose() override; cancel stream subscriptions and stop animations there too. Validation signals include a widget test that disposing the widget releases the resources and no 'used after dispose' or leak warning fires. Risk boundary: leaked controllers and subscriptions accumulate across navigation, growing memory and firing callbacks on dead widgets (setState-after-dispose exceptions); an undisposed AnimationController also keeps a ticker running and wastes frames.
